renders/hgx50/cutouts/0.png.key_features: Shows the front three-quarter view of the multi-gym, highlighting the seat, backrest, and chest press arms with the branding logo clearly visible.

renders/hgx50/cutouts/1.png.key_features: Shows the upper part of the cable tower and a handle, but with very low detail.

renders/hgx50/cutouts/2.png.key_features: Clear view of the seat, backrest, weight stack, and leg press attachment, with good detail on the chain and handlebar.

renders/hgx50/cutouts/3.png.key_features: Clear view of the entire multi-gym from a front-three-quarter angle, highlighting the black and red color scheme and the weight stack.

renders/hgx50/cutouts/4.png.key_features: This image provides a clear profile view of the weight stack and the main frame, with good detail on the seat and backrest.
